Please complete all sections below for guest registration. Attach clear copies of valid ID document(s) on page 2.

ID (Check-in):

Remarks:

General Terms and Conditions

  • Complimentary: Wi-Fi in guest rooms and common areas (where available).
  • Check-in & Check-out: Check-in 2 PM, check-out 12 PM. Early/late times subject to availability and extra charges.
  • Guarantee & Cancellation: Reservations may be released if not guaranteed. Cancel or amend at least 24 hours before check-in to avoid one-night charge.
  • Payment: Rates in BDT. Restaurant, laundry, minibar and incidentals billed to guest folio.
  • General: Valid NID/Passport/Driving License required at check-in. Non-smoking rooms. Hotel may refuse service for policy violations.

Prepared by:
